entryPoint.notes: The <li> is rendered by sections.map() starting at line 44. The 'documents' section is defined at Sidebar.jsx:35 as { id: 'documents', label: '📁 All Documents' }.

calls.notes: Guard: onNavigate is called only when the prop is defined (onNavigate && onNavigate(section.id)). section.id is 'documents' for this nav item.

Sets { activeSection: 'documents' }. Triggers re-render. DocumentGrid is always rendered in the workspace tree; the Sidebar reads the updated activeSection prop and applies navItemActiveStyle to the 'documents' <li> via the ternary at Sidebar.jsx:47.
